headline: Analyst Raises Price Target on UnitedHealth Group (UNH), Keeps ‘Neutral’ Rating
summary: UnitedHealth Group Incorporated (NYSE:UNH) is included among the 15 Best Blue Chip Stocks to Buy Now.
